E:\ProgrammeFiles\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\project.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\JetBrains2024\CLion 2024.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\project.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\project.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\JetBrains2024\CLion 2024.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\project.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o project.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libproject.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\project.dir\linkLibs.rsp
